apigateway.documentationpart.location.Cf:
The `Location` property specifies the location of the Amazon API Gateway API entity that the documentation applies to. `Location` is a property of the [AWS::ApiGateway::DocumentationPart](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-apigateway-documentationpart.html) resource.

**Note**  
For more information about each property, including constraints and valid values, see [DocumentationPart](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/apigateway/api-reference/resource/documentation-part/

apigateway.documentationpart.location.Me.Description: The HTTP verb of a method.

apigateway.documentationpart.location.Na.Description: The name of the targeted API entity.

apigateway.documentationpart.location.Pa.Description: The URL path of the target.

apigateway.documentationpart.location.St.Description: The HTTP status code of a response.

apigateway.documentationpart.location.Ty.Description: The type of API entity that the documentation content applies to.
